case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX VS. TRACI GRANT

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRANT, TRACI $1,779.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,824.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT GRANT, TRACI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
